name: Holiday Spice Cookies/Make Ahead
recipeInstructions:
firmly packed. Just the smell of these cookies baking is enough to get
you in the holiday spirit.
In a large mixing bowl, cream butter with brown sugar until smooth.
Beat eggs and extracts into the mixture.
In another bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt, black pepper,
nutmeg, ground cloves, and mace.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring after each
addition.
Chill dough for 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Shape chilled dough into small ovals using two teaspoons of filling.
Place cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Remove cookies from the baking sheets and transfer them to wire racks.
Sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
Cool completely and store in airtight containers. These cookies
continue to improve in flavor and texture for about 5-8 days after
baking. Yield: approximately 5 dozen cookies.
